# Design System: Clean Shopper
**Version:** 1.0
**Last Updated:** 2026-03-31
**Source:** Generated by /design-system-generator skill from brand interview

---

## How to Use This Document
This file is referenced by CLAUDE.md and read by Claude Code at the start of every session. Apply these tokens for all UI work. Do not hardcode hex values, pixel sizes, or spacing values in components. Reference token names from tailwind.config.js instead.

---

## Brand Direction
Clean Shopper feels healthy, minimal, and smart — like a trusted expert who gives you exactly what you need to make a decision, nothing more. The visual language draws from earthy, natural tones (referencing Bloom and Central Market) with generous whitespace and restrained use of color, in the spirit of Apple: purposeful, uncluttered, and calm. Constraints applied: WCAG AA contrast on all text, warm neutrals throughout (no pure black or pure white), no gradients, no harsh blues — palette stays strictly earthy and warm.

---

## Color System

### Primary Colors
| Token Name | Hex Value | Usage Rule |
|---|---|---|
| primary | #4E7A5C | Primary buttons, active navigation states, and key call-to-action elements. Not used for decorative elements, background fills, or secondary actions. |
| primary-light | #7AA68A | Hover states on primary buttons, selected chip/filter backgrounds, subtle tinted surfaces behind primary content. |
| primary-dark | #325249 | Pressed states on primary buttons, focus rings, high-emphasis primary text links. |

### Secondary Colors
| Token Name | Hex Value | Usage Rule |
|---|---|---|
| secondary | #F5EFE4 | Card backgrounds, surface fills, and section containers. Not used for text, borders, or interactive states. |

### Accent Colors
| Token Name | Hex Value | Usage Rule |
|---|---|---|
| accent | #C07A3A | Interactive highlights such as badges, ingredient rating indicators, category tags, and icon fills that need to stand out from primary. Not used for large surface fills or backgrounds. |

### Semantic Colors
| Token Name | Hex Value | Usage Rule |
|---|---|---|
| success | #4E7A5C | Clean product ratings, positive ingredient assessments, confirmation states, and success toasts. Not used for decorative elements. |
| warning | #C07A3A | Caution ingredient flags, partial safety ratings, and alerts that require attention before proceeding. |
| error | #B55249 | Avoid product ratings, harmful ingredient flags, destructive actions (delete, remove), and error states. |

### Neutral Colors
| Token Name | Hex Value | Usage Rule |
|---|---|---|
| neutral-50 | #FAFAF6 | Page background — the base canvas for all views. |
| neutral-100 | #F5EFE4 | Card backgrounds, surface fills, input field backgrounds. |
| neutral-200 | #E5DDD0 | Borders, dividers, and separator lines between list items. |
| neutral-400 | #B0A394 | Placeholder text in inputs, disabled state text, and inactive icon fills. |
| neutral-600 | #6B5F52 | Secondary text, supporting copy, metadata, and helper labels beneath inputs. |
| neutral-900 | #2B2018 | Primary text and all headings. Never use pure black (#000000). |

---

## Typography

**Font Family:** DM Sans — a clean, humanist sans-serif with a warm character that communicates approachability and intelligence without feeling sterile; well-suited to minimal health and product apps.
**Source:** Google Fonts

### Type Scale
| Token Name | Size | Weight | Line Height | Usage Rule |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| display | 48px | 700 | 1.1 | Hero headlines and marketing moments on landing or onboarding screens only. |
| h1 | 36px | 600 | 1.2 | Page titles — one per view. |
| h2 | 28px | 600 | 1.25 | Section headers that divide major content areas within a page. |
| h3 | 22px | 600 | 1.3 | Card titles, product names, and subsection headers within a content area. |
| h4 | 18px | 500 | 1.35 | Labels above form fields, small section headers, and list group titles. |
| body | 16px | 400 | 1.65 | Body copy, product descriptions, ingredient lists, and all primary reading text. |
| small | 14px | 400 | 1.5 | Supporting text, metadata, category tags, timestamps, and secondary labels. |
| micro | 12px | 400 | 1.4 | Legal text, fine print, and minimal UI chrome such as character counts. |

---

## Spacing Scale

Base unit: 8px

| Token Name | Value | Usage Rule |
|---|---|---|
| space-xs | 4px | Internal icon padding, gap between an icon and its label, tight inline spacing. |
| space-sm | 8px | Compact padding within small components such as tags, chips, and badges. |
| space-md | 16px | Standard internal padding within buttons, input fields, and small cards. |
| space-lg | 24px | Card padding, internal section padding within a component group. |
| space-xl | 40px | Gap between distinct components within a page section. |
| space-2xl | 64px | Gap between major page sections. |
| space-3xl | 96px | Page-level horizontal margins and large vertical section gaps. |
| space-4xl | 128px | Hero sections and full-bleed areas with intentional breathing room. |

---

## Border Radius

| Token Name | Value | Usage Rule |
|---|---|---|
| radius-sm | 4px | Badges, tags, inline chips, and small interactive elements. |
| radius-md | 10px | Input fields, buttons, small cards, and dropdown menus. |
| radius-lg | 18px | Product cards, modals, bottom sheets, and larger container surfaces. |
| radius-full | 9999px | Pills, avatar images, and fully rounded toggle or icon buttons. |

---

## Shadows

| Token Name | Value | Usage Rule |
|---|---|---|
| shadow-sm | 0 1px 3px rgba(43, 32, 24, 0.06), 0 1px 2px rgba(43, 32, 24, 0.04) | Subtle card lift in resting state. Default shadow for all product cards and surface containers. |
| shadow-md | 0 4px 14px rgba(43, 32, 24, 0.09), 0 2px 4px rgba(43, 32, 24, 0.05) | Hover states on interactive cards, open dropdown menus, and floating action elements. |
| shadow-lg | 0 20px 48px rgba(43, 32, 24, 0.13), 0 8px 16px rgba(43, 32, 24, 0.06) | Modals, overlays, and focused/elevated UI layers. |

---

## Usage Rules Summary

These rules apply to every component Claude Code builds for this project:

1. Never hardcode a hex value. Use the token name from tailwind.config.js.
2. Never hardcode a pixel font size. Use the type scale token classes.
3. Never hardcode spacing. Use the spacing scale token classes.
4. Primary color is for the single most important interactive element per view — not for decoration, backgrounds, or secondary actions.
5. Neutral-900 for primary text. Neutral-600 for secondary text. Never use pure black (#000000) or pure white (#FFFFFF).
6. Semantic colors carry meaning. Do not use success green for anything other than positive/clean ingredient states. Do not use error red for anything other than harmful ingredient states or destructive actions.
7. Shadows must stay warm-toned (use neutral-900 base in rgba, not cool grey). Never use default Tailwind drop shadows.
8. No gradients on any surface. Flat color only.
9. Layouts must breathe — default to space-lg or above for card padding. Never use space-xs or space-sm for outer component padding.
